---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

The use case — what are you trying to do that DayPilot doesn't help with today?

## What would the ideal solution look like?

Describe the feature. Sketches, mockups, or examples from other apps welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways you've thought about solving this.

## Additional context

Anything else.

---

⚠️ DayPilot stays opinionated and small on purpose — not every feature fits. Please describe the problem before proposing a specific UI. The best feature requests start with "I want to ____ but I can't because ____".
